Defendant Clem Llc'S Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jan-17-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Richard C. Bennett (510-444-5020) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Christopher Starkey.
Elizabeth D. Rhodes (6-989-5400) for Defendant/Moving party CLEM LLC.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. The matter is heard concurrently with Deft Property Resources Corporation'S Motion for Summary Judgment and Plaintiff's Motion for Sanctions. Hearing is held. Argued re: compliance with crc 3.1350(b), no authority set forth in papers, failure to shift burden, no law to support live/work units are excluded. Plaintiff submits to the tentative ruling. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Clem Llc'S Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden and set forth any statute or case standing for the proposition that live/work units are not subject to habitability laws. Motion for summary adjudication is denied for additional reason for failure to comply with CRC 3.1350(b) Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
